user.title: Connect to Guesty
user.description: Enter your Guesty API credentials. You can find these in the Guesty Developer Dashboard.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Guesty
reauth_confirm.description: Your Guesty credentials need to be updated. Please enter your new client secret.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your client ID and secret.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Guesty API. Please check your network connection.
error.rate_limited: Too many authentication attempts. Please try again later.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Guesty account is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the Guesty API for listing updates. Minimum 5 minutes.

error.invalid_scan_interval: Scan interval must be at least 5 minutes.
